arguments_redacted.title: Welcome to Marshside Community Garden
arguments_redacted.content:
## A neighborhood garden, grown by neighbors like you

Marshside Community Garden is a shared green space tended by the people who live around it. Whether you want to grow tomatoes, meet a neighbor, get your hands in the soil, or just enjoy a quiet bench under the oak tree — there's a place for you here.

We're open to everyone in the neighborhood. No gardening experience required. No green thumb required. Just bring your curiosity (and maybe a sun hat).

## What you'll find at the garden

- **Raised garden plots** that neighbors can request and tend for the season
- **A shared herb and pollinator garden** open to anyone to enjoy
- **Tools, compost, and water** available to plot holders and volunteers
- **Monthly workdays** where we plant, weed, build, and share a snack
- **Seasonal events** like seedling swaps, harvest potlucks, and kids' planting days

## Ways to get involved

### 🌱 Request a garden plot
Plots are assigned each spring on a first-come, first-served basis, with priority for neighbors who live within walking distance.
[See plot details and request a plot →](/garden-plots/)

### 🛠️ Join a workday or event
Workdays are casual, friendly, and family-welcome. Drop in for an hour or stay the morning.
[See upcoming events →](/events/)

### 🤝 Volunteer with us
We always need help with watering shifts, tool care, event hosting, and welcoming new neighbors.
[Find a volunteer role →](/volunteer/)

### ✉️ Just have a question?
We're real neighbors and we love hearing from you.
[Get in touch →](/contact/)

## Visit the garden

The garden is **open every day from sunrise to sunset**. The front gate stays unlocked during daylight hours — come walk the paths, sit a while, or say hello to whoever happens to be weeding.

We can't wait to meet you.

arguments_redacted.title: Events & Workdays
arguments_redacted.content:
## Come garden with your neighbors

Our events are open to **everyone** — plot holders, future gardeners, curious neighbors, kids, dogs on leashes, and folks who just want to sit on a bench and watch the bees. You don't need to RSVP for most events, but it's always nice to know you're coming.

## Regular happenings

### 🛠️ Monthly Workday
**Second Saturday of every month • 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM**

Our biggest gathering of the month. We tackle shared projects — building, mulching, pruning, planting — and we always share coffee and snacks. Stay for the whole morning or just an hour. Tools and gloves provided.

### 💧 Tuesday Evening Watering & Weeding
**Every Tuesday • 6:00 PM – 7:30 PM**

A quieter weekly drop-in. Bring a water bottle, pull a few weeds, and catch up with neighbors as the sun goes down.

### 🌻 Open Garden Hours
**Every day • Sunrise to sunset**

You don't need an event to visit. The gate is open all day.

## Seasonal events

We host a handful of special gatherings each year. Watch this page (or our front gate chalkboard!) for dates.

- **Spring Seedling Swap** — Early April. Bring extra starts, take home new ones.
- **Kids' Planting Day** — Late May. Little hands welcome, dirt encouraged.
- **Midsummer Garden Party** — July. Potluck, music, and a tour of every plot.
- **Harvest Potluck** — September. Bring a dish made with something you grew.
- **Garden Bedding-Down Day** — October. We mulch the beds for winter and toast the season.

## Want to host an event?

Have an idea for a class, a meetup, or a workshop you'd love to hold at the garden? We love when neighbors bring their skills to share.

[Get in touch →](/contact/) and let's make it happen.

arguments_redacted.title: Contact Us
arguments_redacted.content:
## Say hello

We're a small group of neighbors and we love hearing from people. Whether you want to request a plot, volunteer, ask a gardening question, or just introduce yourself — please reach out.

## How to reach us

### ✉️ Email
**hello@marshsidegarden.org**

The fastest way to get a response. A real human (one of us!) reads every message and usually replies within a week.

### 📬 At the garden
There's a small **weatherproof message box** mounted on the tool shed by the front gate. Drop a note any time — we check it during Tuesday evening watering.

### 📍 Visit in person
**Marshside Community Garden**
[Add street address here]
[Add city, state, zip here]

The front gate is open every day from sunrise to sunset. Come on in and have a look around. If you visit during a Tuesday evening watering (6:00–7:30 PM) or a second-Saturday workday (9:00 AM–noon), you're almost guaranteed to find someone to chat with.

## Common questions

**How do I request a plot?**
See the [Garden Plots](/garden-plots/) page for details, then email us.

**Can I just stop by?**
Yes! The garden is always open during daylight hours. No appointment needed.

**Do you accept donations?**
We do — soil, seeds, gently used tools, and small cash contributions all help. Email us first so we can make sure your donation will be put to good use.

**Are dogs welcome?**
Yes, on a leash, and please clean up. We love a good garden dog.

**I have an idea for the garden!**
We'd love to hear it. Send us an email or drop a note in the message box.

---

*We're neighbors, not a help desk. Please be patient — sometimes life (or the tomato harvest) gets in the way of a quick reply.*
